channel.title: King County Metro Service Advisories
channel.description: Fixture service advisories for parser tests.

item.title: Routes 7, 49 and 60 rerouted in Downtown Seattle
item.description: Routes 7, 49 and 60 are rerouted near Downtown Seattle due to a blocked street.

item.title: Route 40 delays near Ballard Bridge
item.description: Route 40 is delayed near Ballard Bridge with trips running about 15 minutes late.
